title: Beyond The Weather
description: Adventuring, Surviving & Storm Chasing is now all possible in one modpack!
body:
Get ready for the Storms!



This modpack is built around playing your way! Shape the world with more building blocks, soar through the skies with **Immersive Aircraft** to explore the dynamic landscape, or experience Minecraft like never before with **Protonomaly’s Weather Mod**, bringing powerful and realistic storms to life! When the weather turns violent, climb into your **TIV2** and chase down massive storms across the world. Whether you’re a builder, adventurer, or storm chaser, this modpack lets you play Minecraft your way.



🌪️Mods & Features✈️

**Adventuring:** Immersive Aircraft, Man of Many Planes, Dynamic Lights, Repurposed Structures, Small Horse Stable, Ancient Structures, Automobility, Aztec Temple & Ruins, Camerapture,
Exposure, Dawn of Time, Immersive Aircraft, Kelka backpack’s & Man of Many Planes
|
**Surviving:** WI Zoom, Armor of the Ages, Backpacks!, Little Structures, Mini Clock Tower, Ore Vein Miner & Panda’s Falling Trees
|
**Weather:** ProtoManly’s Weather, PMShaders, PMW Radar Overhaul!, PMW Storms Shake Screen!, PMWeatherAPI & Tornado Intercept (PMW)
|
**Building:** Continuity, Just Enough Items, Distant Horizons, MSS, Furnection, Macaw’s Doors & Iris Shaders
|
**FPS Boosting + Addons:** AI Improvements, Architectury API, Cloth Config API, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (NeoForge), Sodium & MUCH MORE!


Would recommend more than 4GB of RAM for this modpack.
